title: 4Pcs Black Magnetic Hooks, with Hooks, 16MM Strong Magnetic Hook for Kitchens, Fridge, Door, Locker, Garages and Camping
features: Strong load-bearing hook: The black hook adopts a core, with a vertical load-bearing capacity of up to 6kg, and is protected by three layers of anti rust coating. It can firmly adhere to iron surfaces such as refrigerators and metal cabinet doors, and hang heavy objects without falling off
No installation suction design: The hook does not require drilling or tools, and can be used with just one stick

Rust prevention treatment: The heavy-duty hook has been tested and verified to be suitable for humid environments such as cruise ships/garages. Smooth surface without burrs, leaving no scratches when used
Scene space : The strong magnet is well suitable for various scenarios such as kitchens, offices, garages, camping, cruise ships, etc., easily solving home/outdoor suspension needs

Intelligent rotating hook design: The hanging hook features an innovative 180 ° bidirectional rotating structure, allowing for free adjustment of the suspension direction. The hook adopts a snap on disassembly design, which can be used for multiple purposes to meet diverse storage needs
description: These premium hooks are designed for maximum strength and versatility, providing incredible support on any metal surface. The innovative 180 ° rotating hook design allows for flexible suspension in any direction, making it ideal for organizing and maximizing space utilization in various environments. Black oxide coating can prevent rust while maintaining strong magnetic adhesion to any steel surface.
